title: verbascum rotundifolium var. numidicum
intro: Verbascum rotundifolium var. numidicum, also known as Mulla or Mulukh, is a plant species within the Verbascum genus that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of soothing and protecting mucous membranes. In herbal preparations, Verbascum rotundifolium var. numidicum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
